creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 153235
Patch to update sysutils/currtime to 0.2.1

Hi
I am the maintainer of the port sysutils/currtime, and have a patch to update this port to it's newest version: 0.2.1. I have attached the patch, and will upload the Poudriere Build Log shortly.
Thanks,
Neel
